nodes.label: TEST_MODE (SQLite Testing)
nodes.rationale: SQLite for tests: zero infra to run the test suite; production uses Postgres. Both share the same SQLAlchemy models.

nodes.label: worker-service (RQ + Redis)
nodes.rationale: RQ over Celery: simpler, fewer dependencies, sufficient for this scale. RQ's web UI is a nice bonus.

nodes.label: mcp-service (FastMCP)
nodes.rationale: Official MCP Python SDK: standard, well-supported, and works out-of-the-box with Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

nodes.label: StaticSeedDataSource
nodes.rationale: Static seed data: deterministic dev experience; no flaky tests waiting on a remote API.

nodes.label: MockLLMAdapter
nodes.rationale: Mock LLM adapter: lets the system run end-to-end without external API keys. Swap in OpenAI/Anthropic by subclassing LLMAdapter.
